# datadog_current_user (Data Source)

Retrieve information about the user associated with the authentication context used by the Datadog provider. This data source is also useful for retrieving organization metadata.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "datadog_current_user" "me" {}

locals {
  greeting = "Hello ${data.datadog_current_user.me.name}, your org id is ${data.datadog_current_user.me.org_id}"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `email` (String) Email of the user.
- `handle` (String) The user's handle.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String) Name of the user.
- `org_id` (String) The UUID of the user's organization.
- `org_name` (String) Name of the user's organization.
- `org_public_id` (String) The public_id of the user's organization.
- `service_account` (Boolean) Indicates whether the user is a service account.
